definition: Breaker block + FVG overlap — one of the highest-probability entry patterns.
depends_on: fair_value_gaps (FVG created when OB was broken through)
feeds_into: trade entry (unicorn zone IS the entry)
related_to: displacement (the move through the OB that creates the breaker IS displacement)
formation_chain: OB forms → price returns and breaks THROUGH OB → OB becomes breaker (from order_blocks) → the breakthrough move creates FVG (from fair_value_gaps) → overlap of breaker + FVG = unicorn entry zone. This chains order_blocks → breaker_blocks → fair_value_gaps → unicorn.
